'''godahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:loathy|loathy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loathy|loathy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| godahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:godahithi|godahithi]] || [[word:godahiji|godahiji]] || [[word:godahishi|godahishi]] || [[word:godahiki|godahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:godahuthuthu|godahuthuthu]] || [[word:godahujuju|godahujuju]] || [[word:godahushushu|godahushushu]] || [[word:godahukuku|godahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:godahuthu|godahuthu]] || [[word:godahuju|godahuju]] || [[word:godahushu|godahushu]] || [[word:godahuku|godahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:godahufthuf|godahufthuf]] || [[word:godahufjuf|godahufjuf]] || [[word:godahufshuf|godahufshuf]] || [[word:godahufkuf|godahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:godahethe|godahethe]] || [[word:godaheje|godaheje]] || [[word:godaheshe|godaheshe]] || [[word:godaheke|godaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:godahothotho|godahothotho]] || [[word:godahojojo|godahojojo]] || [[word:godahoshosho|godahoshosho]] || [[word:godahokoko|godahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:godahotho|godahotho]] || [[word:godahojo|godahojo]] || [[word:godahosho|godahosho]] || [[word:godahoko|godahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:godahofthof|godahofthof]] || [[word:godahofjof|godahofjof]] || [[word:godahofshof|godahofshof]] || [[word:godahofkof|godahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:godahÃŸfthÃŸf|godahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfjÃŸf|godahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfshÃŸf|godahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfkÃŸf|godahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:godahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|godahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|godahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|godahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|godahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:godahÃŸfthÃŸf|godahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfjÃŸf|godahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfshÃŸf|godahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfkÃŸf|godahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:godahÃŸfthÃŸf|godahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfjÃŸf|godahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfshÃŸf|godahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:godahÃŸfkÃŸf|godahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:godahÃḊthÃḊ|godahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:godahÃḊjÃḊ|godahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:godahÃḊshÃḊ|godahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:godahÃḊkÃḊ|godahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:godahathatha|godahathatha]] || [[word:godahajaja|godahajaja]] || [[word:godahashasha|godahashasha]] || [[word:godahakaka|godahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:godahatha|godahatha]] || [[word:godahaja|godahaja]] || [[word:godahasha|godahasha]] || [[word:godahaka|godahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:godahafthaf|godahafthaf]] || [[word:godahafjaf|godahafjaf]] || [[word:godahafshaf|godahafshaf]] || [[word:godahafkaf|godahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:godahasha|godahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:godahshÃḋsha|godahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godahrosha|godahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godahmusha|godahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:godahyasha|godahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogodahnkshÃḋsha|gogodahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogodahnkrosha|gogodahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogodahnkmusha|gogodahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogodahnkyasha|gogodahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:godadahasha|godadahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:godadahshÃḋsha|godadahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godadahrosha|godadahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godadahmusha|godadahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:godadahyasha|godadahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogodadahnkshÃḋsha|gogodadahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogodadahnkrosha|gogodadahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogodadahnkmusha|gogodadahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogodadahnkyasha|gogodadahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gedÃḊhasha|gedÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gedÃḊhshÃḋsha|gedÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gedÃḊhrosha|gedÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gedÃḊhmusha|gedÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gedÃḊhyasha|gedÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogedÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gogedÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogedÃḊhnkrosha|gogedÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogedÃḊhnkmusha|gogedÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogedÃḊhnkyasha|gogedÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:godfahasha|godfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:godfahshÃḋsha|godfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godfahrosha|godfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godfahmusha|godfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:godfahyasha|godfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogodfahnkshÃḋsha|gogodfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogodfahnkrosha|gogodfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogodfahnkmusha|gogodfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogodfahnkyasha|gogodfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
